message:
Complete parser refactoring - extract statements module

Reduces parser.zig from 645 to 157 lines (final 89% total reduction from 1,402 lines).

Created src/parser/statements.zig (497 lines):
- parseExprOrAssign - assignments and expression statements
- parseFunctionDef - function/async function definitions
- parseClassDef - class definitions with inheritance
- parseIf, parseFor, parseWhile - control flow
- parseReturn, parseAssert - simple statements
- parseImport, parseImportFrom - module imports
- parseBlock - statement blocks

Parser refactoring complete:
- ✅ parser.zig (157 lines) - Core Parser struct + dispatch
- ✅ statements.zig (497 lines) - Statement parsing
- ✅ expressions.zig (335 lines) - Expression parsing
- ✅ postfix.zig (342 lines) - Postfix operations
- ✅ literals.zig (123 lines) - Literal parsing

Benefits achieved:
- Clear module boundaries for parallel development
- Each module < 500 lines (well within guidelines)
- Core parser.zig reduced to ~150 lines (10% of original)
- Zero functional regressions - all tests passing
